title: How to: Power management
excerpt: Understand and manage the van's power sources and loads.

list.name: Specification sheet
description: Cummins RV Generator 2.5–2.8 HGLAA specification sheet — power output, fuel, and electrical ratings for the installed gasoline generator.

list.name: Cummins document
description: Manufacturer document from the Cummins asset library (exact type not yet confirmed).

list.name: Product page
description: The physical control panel that drives the thermostat loop using its own CP plus temperature sensor, independent of the Garmin display.

list.name: Operating instructions
description: This edition covers the exact Aventa + Combi pairing installed in this van. Includes the rotary push-button menu and the ACC (Automatic Climate Control) setting, which must be ON for the Garmin panel to be able to issue temperature commands.

list.name: Product page
description: The 13,500 BTU/h rooftop air conditioner installed in this van, with the SoftStartRV module pre-installed to reduce start-up amp draw on inverter power. Cooling only — this model has no heat pump.

list.name: Product guide
description: Manufacturer's feature and specification summary for the Aventa line.

list.name: Operating instructions
description: Full operating instructions, including the automatic, manual, and dehumidification fan modes shown on the touchscreen.

list.name: Product page
description: The gasoline-fired furnace and hot water heater installed in this van — a separate unit from the roof-mounted Aventa, mounted low inside the van and ducted to floor-level vents. Runs on gas, electric, or a mix of both.

list.name: One sheet
description: A single-page specification and feature summary.

list.name: Operating instructions
description: Covers initial start-up, filling the water container, and the gas/electric/mix energy-source modes for cabin heat and hot water.

list.name: Quick start guide
description: Truma's general Combi-family quick-start reference — no Combi G-specific edition was published separately, but the gas/electric/mix controls are the same across the family.

list.name: Control panel
description: user manual for Coachmen Class B Vans.
